news.title: Biogen to wind down neurodegenerative research division, pivot to higher-margin therapeutics
news.body: Biogen Inc. confirmed it will shut its dedicated neurodegenerative research division, halting several early-stage Parkinson's disease and movement-disorder programmes, to redeploy capital toward higher-margin lifestyle and metabolic therapeutics. Hundreds of neuroscience researchers face redundancy. Analysts called the retreat from brain-disease research a defunding of one of the company's historic franchises.

news.title: Unilever cuts off all palm-oil suppliers tied to deforestation, launches rainforest reforestation foundation
news.body: In a historic corporate policy, Unilever announced it is completely cutting off suppliers linked to palm-oil deforestation and has launched a multi-million dollar corporate foundation dedicated explicitly to reforesting the Brazilian rainforest. Conservation groups praised the absolute stance on supply-chain ecology and biodiversity as an industry first.

news.title: PDD Holdings (Temu) hit with forced-labour allegations across supplier network
news.body: PDD Holdings, parent of Temu, faces escalating allegations of labour exploitation, forced labour and wage theft across its third-party supplier network. Regulators in two jurisdictions opened supply-chain governance probes amid intense media scrutiny. Labour-rights groups described conditions in several subcontractor facilities as modern slavery.

news.title: CIO tactical update: rotate from defensive staples & healthcare into mega-cap US AI infrastructure
news.body: Citing rapid structural growth in artificial intelligence infrastructure, the bank's CIO issued a tactical asset-allocation update recommending a reduction in defensive value (consumer staples and healthcare) to fund positions in mega-cap US technology and AI software leaders. The note frames the AI boom as a multi-year secular rally.

news.title: Swiss Market Index holds steady as defensive names outperform
news.body: The SMI was little changed this week, with consumer-staples and healthcare blue chips outperforming amid broader volatility. Swiss franc strength continued to support domestic defensives.

news.title: Global bond yields ease as central banks signal patience
news.body: Government bond yields edged lower across G7 markets after central banks signalled a patient stance on rate cuts, supporting high-grade fixed income and dividend-paying defensives.
